params.name: Marilyn Diptych
params.description: Marilyn Diptych is an outstanding example of contemporary pop Art, created by US artist Warhol himself, aimed at showcasing the public image of Huullywood star Marilyn and the cultural phenomenon behind it. The works are based on Marilyn's photographic materials and use silkscreen printing techniques to create a repeated overlay visual effect, reflecting pop Art's reshaping of popular cultural symbols. In Marilyn's prints, Warhol deconstructs and reorganizes Marilyn's image, with each print havi …
